column1: Table 4: Knife and offensive weapon offences resulting in a caution or sentence by police force area, in England and Wales, annually from 2014 [note 1]
This worksheet contains one table. Some cells refer to notes which can be found on the notes worksheet.
u indicates that one or more of the comparative numbers are less than 50. For small numbers this could give misleading rate information.
Figures in columns 1 to 11 refer to the numbers of offences, figures in columns 12 to 22 refer to the rates of offences per 100,000 of the population
